expectations.text: References only real endpoints from the skill's catalog
expectations.evidence: GET /api/v1/fermentations/{id}, GET /api/v1/fermentations/{id}/samples/latest, GET /api/v1/executions/{execution_id}/alerts, POST /api/v1/alerts/{id}/acknowledge, POST /api/v1/alerts/{id}/dismiss — all use the /api/v1/ versioned prefix consistent with the catalog
Every endpoint block includes 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>' in the request headers

expectations.text: Notes that winery_id is automatic via JWT (not passed manually)
expectations.evidence: winery_id appears only as a field in the response body ('"winery_id": 1') with no mention that it is derived automatically from the JWT and should not be passed as a request parameter

expectations.text: Suggests polling interval for live fermentation data
expectations.evidence: No WebSockets — poll every 30–60 seconds: GET /api/v1/fermentations/{id}, GET /api/v1/fermentations/{id}/samples/latest, GET /api/v1/executions/{executionId}/alerts
POST /api/v1/alerts/{id}/acknowledge — 'I've seen this' (stays in list, turns grey); POST /api/v1/alerts/{id}/dismiss — 'I've dealt with this' (removed from active list)
